B.SIGN_TEMPLATE, B.ESIGN_TYPE, B.REPORT_PATH, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, T.NOTE_TITLE, B.ATTACHMENT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID, B.LEARNING_ITEM_ID, B.LEARN_CONTENT_TYPE, B.REPORT_PARAMETERS, B.ANALYTICS_PATH,
